scripts.render:chat: remotion render src/index.ts AIChatDemo public/videos/ai-chat-demo.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts AIChatDemo public/videos/ai-chat-demo.webm --codec=vp8
scripts.render:pain-points: remotion render src/index.ts PainPointDemo public/videos/pain-point-demo.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts PainPointDemo public/videos/pain-point-demo.webm --codec=vp8
scripts.render:competitor: remotion render src/index.ts CompetitorDemo public/videos/competitor-demo.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts CompetitorDemo public/videos/competitor-demo.webm --codec=vp8
scripts.render:overview: remotion render src/index.ts ProductOverview public/videos/product-overview.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts ProductOverview public/videos/product-overview.webm --codec=vp8
scripts.render:posters: remotion still src/index.ts AIChatDemo public/videos/ai-chat-demo-poster.webp --image-format=webp --frame=0 && remotion still src/index.ts PainPointDemo public/videos/pain-point-demo-poster.webp --image-format=webp --frame=0 && remotion still src/index.ts ProductOverview public/videos/product-overview-poster.webp --image-format=webp --frame=0
scripts.render:all: npm run render:chat && npm run render:pain-points && npm run render:competitor && npm run render:overview && npm run render:posters
